title: CLI Commands Reference
description: Complete command reference for the Acme CLI
content:
## Overview

The Acme CLI is a command-line tool for managing documentation projects, pages, deployments, and more.

## Global Options

These options are available on all commands:

| Option | Description |
|--------|------------|
| `--json` | Output machine-readable JSON |
| `--token` | API key (overrides config) |
| `--org` | Organization ID |
| `--api-url` | API base URL |

## Authentication Commands

### acme auth login

Authenticate with the Acme platform.

### acme auth logout

Remove stored credentials.

### acme auth status

Check current authentication status.

## Project Management Commands

### acme projects list

List all projects in the current organization.

### acme projects create

Create a new documentation project.

### acme projects get

Get details about a specific project.

### acme projects delete

Delete a project and all its content.

### acme projects plan get

Get the current documentation plan.

### acme projects plan set

Update the documentation plan.

### acme projects settings get

Get project settings.

### acme projects settings update

Update project settings.

## Page Management Commands

### acme pages list

List all pages in a project.

### acme pages create

Create a new page.

### acme pages get

Get page content and metadata.

### acme pages update

Update page content.

### acme pages delete

Delete a page.

## Deployment Commands

### acme deploy

Deploy the project to production.

### acme deploy preview

Create a preview deployment.

### acme deploy status

Check deployment status.

### acme deploy rollback

Roll back to a previous deployment.

## Configuration Commands

### acme config get

Get the current CLI configuration.

### acme config set

Update CLI configuration values.

### acme config reset

Reset CLI configuration to defaults.
